sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93653" key="selidhfa/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σελῐδηφάγος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σελίς</etym>) <sense id="n93653.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">devouring leaves of books</tr_>, of a bookworm, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.251</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Even.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
